name: Advance Auto Parts, Inc.
description: Advance Auto Parts, Inc. is a leading automotive aftermarket parts provider in North America, serving both professional installers and do-it-yourself customers. The company operates stores and branches under the Advance Auto Parts, Carquest, and Worldpac brands, offering a broad selection of brand name, OEM, and private label automotive replacement parts, accessories, batteries, and maintenance items for domestic and imported cars, vans, sport utility vehicles, and light trucks.
